description: Implement the overwatcher auto-tier gate (#120): in Overwatch.Decide, under autonomyPolicy:auto AND autonomyBlockPresent, SILENTLY auto-apply a sanctioned ALLOWLIST lever (grant without ConfirmApply); auto WITHOUT the block still degrades to prompt (byte-identical); DENYLIST stays human-only. AND wire SchedulerFactory's new Overwatch(...) to pass plan.Config.Autonomy is not null. Makes the authored OverwatchAutoTierTests pass. writeScope spans Overwatch.cs + SchedulerFactory.cs because the gate + the value that feeds it are one compile unit.
